description: Prescription verification API SaaS platform for online pharmacies.
archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (blended with HealthTech precision)

surface_strategies.cards: Clean card-based layout with rounded corners (rounded-xl), subtle ambient shadows (shadow-sm), white backgrounds.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Dark sidebar (#232E32) with high contrast white text and electric blue (#1B47DB) active states.
surface_strategies.accents: Gradient accents on key metrics cards (e.g., from-white to-blue-50/20) and terracotta highlights for warnings or suspicious rates.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous whitespace. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards to let content breathe.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Bento or control room style: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Charts span larger columns.

pages.name: Landing Page
pages.focus: Targeting pharmacy businesses. Hero section highlighting API speed and reliability. High impact imagery.

pages.name: Auth
pages.focus: Login/Register. Email + Google OAuth. Split screen with a medical/code abstract image on one side, clean form on the other.

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.focus: Analytics cards (total verified, valid/invalid/suspicious rates, fraud caught, API call count, cost savings). Horizontal bar charts with diagonal line fill. Line graphs for trends. Recent verification table.

pages.name: API Keys
pages.focus: Generate key with name/description, list keys with usage stats, copy to clipboard, revoke key, show endpoint code snippets.

pages.name: Developer Docs
pages.focus: Quick start guide, code examples (cURL, JS, Python), webhook setup. Sidebar navigation.

pages.name: Billing
pages.focus: 3 Plans (Free 100/mo, Pro $29 10k/mo, Enterprise $99 unlimited). Clear pricing cards with primary and accent buttons.

components_instructions.charts: Use Recharts. For the horizontal bar chart, define an SVG <pattern> for the diagonal line fill style and apply it to the bar fill.
components_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table components. Add hover states to rows.
components_instructions.buttons: Rounded-lg. Primary button uses electric blue (#1B47DB). Warnings/Destructive use terracotta (#B26552).
components_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure `Onest` font is applied globally as the user explicitly requested.
Implement the dark sidebar EXACTLY with the hex #232E32.
Use Recharts for the dashboard and implement the custom diagonal line fill using SVG patterns for the bar chart.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the Landing Page layout to ensure creative freedom. Use Shadcn components for Dashboard and Apps heavily customized to match the provided colors.
Strictly follow the color palette provided: #1B47DB for primary actions and #B26552 for terracotta highlights/warnings.
